JUDMT. OSC AND SANCTION TO PLAINTIFF IN PRO PERSONA, WEI MING FENG, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-27-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAY-12-1999 TO JUN-30-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-30-1999, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER WEI MING FENG FOR FAILURE TO FILE POA,OBTAIN ANSWERS FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFAULT CANNOT BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-15-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUN-30-1999 TO SEP-01-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
